penalties.description: Minor deviation observed just outside the marked line.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion status. GPT-4o reported successful completion in 85 seconds with minor line deviation, while Claude reported incomplete task at timeout. Given GPT detected circle_release phase and provided specific completion time, the task appears to have been completed. Retained the line deviation penalty as GPT provided specific visual evidence.

disagreements.rationale: GPT detected circle_release phase indicating task completion, while Claude only detected up to circle_following phase suggesting incomplete task observation.
If task was completed as GPT indicates, incomplete_circle penalty would not apply. Line deviation penalty is consistent with completed task.
Circle_release phase detection supports task completion rather than timeout scenario.
